items.headline: Haaland bags two as Norway down Senegal 3-2
items.body: On a rain-soaked day at MetLife, Erling Haaland scored twice to send Norway through to the last 32 with a game to spare. He's up to four goals in two matches — the man is unstoppable right now.
items.say: Haaland just put up another brace — four goals in two World Cup games. Norway's already through to the knockouts.

items.headline: USA punch their ticket to the knockout round
items.body: A 2-0 win over Australia in Seattle clinched a spot in the Round of 32 with a group game to spare — the first time the U.S. has locked up a knockout berth this early in the modern era. Home-field magic is real.
items.say: The USMNT's into the knockouts already — beat Australia 2-0. Feels different playing a World Cup on home soil, huh?

items.headline: NBA Draft is tonight — Wizards on the clock
items.body: Washington holds the No. 1 pick, with BYU's AJ Dybantsa and Kansas' Darryn Peterson the favorites to go first off the board. It's a deep class, so a lot of fan bases are about to meet their new guy.
items.say: NBA Draft's tonight — Wizards have the top pick. Dybantsa or Peterson at No. 1, who you got?

items.headline: Serena's back — singles wild card at Wimbledon
items.body: Serena Williams accepted a wild card into the Wimbledon singles draw, her first singles major since 2022. The seven-time champ will also team with sister Venus in doubles when the grass-court Slam opens June 29.
items.say: Did you hear Serena's playing Wimbledon singles again? First time since 2022 — and she's doubles with Venus too.

items.headline: Hamilton finally wins one for Ferrari
items.body: Lewis Hamilton claimed his first Grand Prix victory in red at Barcelona, a perfectly-timed strategy gamble sealing win No. 106. At 41, he's the oldest GP winner since 1970 — and the relief in his radio call said it all.
items.say: Hamilton got his first Ferrari win at Barcelona — took him a while, but you could hear how much it meant.

items.headline: Supergirl flies into theaters this weekend
items.body: DC's reboot lands Friday, with Milly Alcock as Kara Zor-El on a galaxy-spanning road trip — Jason Momoa's chaotic bounty hunter Lobo in tow. It's the next big swing in James Gunn's rebuilt DC universe.
items.say: Supergirl opens this weekend — Milly Alcock's the new Kara, and Jason Momoa plays Lobo. Looks like a fun one.

items.headline: Jackass returns for one last ride
items.body: Johnny Knoxville and the gang are back Friday for 'Jackass: Best and Last,' a 25th-anniversary sendoff mixing brand-new stunts with never-before-seen footage. The final outrageous chapter of the crew.
items.say: There's one more Jackass movie out this weekend — the last one, supposedly. Were you a fan back in the day?

items.headline: Avatar: The Last Airbender returns Thursday
items.body: Netflix's live-action Season 2 drops all seven episodes June 25, taking Aang and the gang to the Earth Kingdom — and finally introducing fan-favorite earthbender Toph. Expect Ba Sing Se, Azula, and a lot of bending.
items.say: Live-action Avatar Season 2 hits Netflix Thursday — they're finally bringing in Toph. The fans are going to lose it.

items.headline: The Strokes are back with 'Going Shopping'
items.body: The band shared 'Going Shopping,' their first new music since 2020, as the lead single off an upcoming Rick Rubin-produced album, 'Reality Awaits.' That jangly, slacker-cool Strokes sound, right on cue.
items.say: New Strokes single's out — first new music from them in like five years. Still sounds exactly like the Strokes.
